text:
Hi, Martin!

Martin Glaß wrote on 25.02.2012 03:05:
> finally, here's the most current version.
> also fixed some other bugs i came across.
>
> - cheers

This definitely getting us closer. Would you please also check your port 
with portlint (ports-mgmt/portlint) and fix the warnings/errors you got? 
After that I will be able to add this to the tree. Thank you.

-- 
Regards,
Ruslan

Tinderboxing kills... the drives.
